description: A densely packed single-line for/if body expands to brace-on-own-line form with normalized spacing and 4-space indentation.

origin.notes: Style pattern (brace-on-own-line, 4-space indent, spaced operators) cross-checked against pawn-parser test suite / pawnfmt test suite, MIT licensed, PawnKit (testdata/expected/loop_statements.pwn), but this fixture's content is authored fresh for pawn-corpus.

expected.notes: Idempotence expected: formatting expected.pwn again must reproduce it unchanged.
